_README: HSF VOTER GUIDE - SEED DATA FILE
This file is the entire content of the guide. The app renders it and adds nothing.
Edit this file to change the guide. No code changes required.
Anything marked TODO must be filled in by the publishing organization before launch.
Validate edits at jsonlint.com before publishing - one missing comma blanks the site.

settings.tagline: Hold the Line. Seize New Ground. Fight Like Hell.
settings.publisher_name: TODO - registered name of the publishing organization
settings.paid_for_by: TODO - required disclaimer string, exact wording from counsel
settings.methodology_note: TODO - two or three sentences on how entries are chosen. Readers trust a guide that shows its work.

categories.blurb: Incumbents in office who are doing the work. Defend these seats.
Candidates committed to going further than the seat's current occupant.
Organizations on the front lines. Show up, give, volunteer.

races.notes: TODO - Arizona has 9 congressional districts. Create one race record per district you cover. No U.S. Senate race in Arizona this cycle - verify in Phase 3.
Statewide race - appears on every county ballot.
TODO - Arizona has 30 legislative districts. Some straddle county lines, so list every county a district touches.
Each LD elects two House members. Voters may select two.
County sheriff and county attorney are the two local offices most directly tied to how immigration enforcement cooperation plays out on the ground.

races.office: TODO - City Council Ward N, Mayor, or School Governing Board
races.notes: School board races are usually the lowest-information, highest-leverage item on the ballot.

entries.name: PLACEHOLDER - Candidate Name
entries.ballot_designation: TODO - party or nonpartisan, publisher's call on whether to display
entries.headline: One line on why this seat has to hold.
entries.summary: Two or three sentences in the publisher's own voice. Specific record, not adjectives. What did this person actually do that earned the spot.

entries.name: PLACEHOLDER - Candidate Name
entries.headline: One line on what this candidate would push further.
entries.summary: Where this candidate goes beyond the current occupant of the seat. Be specific about the gap - that is the whole argument of this category.
why_bullets: Position that goes further than the incumbent

organizations.name: PLACEHOLDER - Organization Name
organizations.description: Two or three sentences on what this group actually does. Written so a stranger reading it at a doorstep understands in five seconds.
ways_to_help: Donate to the bail or legal fund
